ocr.text: In Table 1, the header comprises Individuals, Markers, QTL, Epistasis, Heritability, and BLUP, with data for five runs. Run 1
reports 691 individuals, 246 markers, 62 QTL, 0.1 epistasis, 0.48 heritability, and 0.62 BLUP. Run 2 has 782 individuals, 241
markers, 68 QTL, 0 epistasis, 0.61 heritability, and 0.74 BLUP. Run 3 features 873 individuals, 237 markers, 75 QTL, 0
epistasis, 0.74 heritability, and 0.83 BLUP. Run 4 includes 964 individuals, 232 markers, 81 QTL, 0 epistasis, 0.87 heritability,
and 0.92 BLUP. Finally, Run 5 shows 1055 individuals, 228 markers, 88 QTL, 0 epistasis, 1 heritability, and 1 BLUP. In Table
2, the header includes Similar Subs (All sites), Similar Subs (Aberrant sites), Haplotypes (All sites), and Haplotypes (Aberrant
sites).
Individuals  Markers  QTL  Epistasis  Heritability  BLUP
Similar Subs (All sites)  Similar Subs (Aberrant sites)  Haplotypes (All sites)  Haplotypes (Aberrant sites)
Mithan  891  63  2  12
Banteng  886  69  0  11
The Gaur has 888 similar subs across all sites, 49 at aberrant sites, 3 haplotypes across all sites, and 8 at aberrant sites. Mithan
shows 891 similar subs (all), 63 (aberrant), 2 haplotypes (all), and 12 (aberrant). Banteng has 886 similar subs (all), 69
(aberrant), 0 haplotypes (all), and 11 (aberrant). Bison presents 882 similar subs (all), 74 (aberrant), 1 haplotype (all), and 12
(aberrant), while Yak has 917 similar subs (all), 79 (aberrant), 4 haplotypes (all), and 20 (aberrant).
